layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind's generous spacing (p-6, p-8, p-12, gap-8) for breathing room
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-xl for cards, rounded-full for pills/buttons

buttons.primary: bg-[#7C3AED] hover:bg-[#6D28D9] text-white rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(124,58,237,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-[#111111] border border-[#222222] hover:bg-[#222222] hover:text-white text-[#A1A1AA] rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all

cards.base: bg-[#111111] border border-[#222222] rounded-xl p-6 relative overflow-hidden

navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#222222]

split_screen_interview.right_panel: border-l border-[#222222] bg-[#111111] overflow-hidden flex flex-col

form_elements.input: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#222222] focus:border-[#7C3AED] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#7C3AED] text-white rounded-md
form_elements.label: text-sm font-medium text-[#A1A1AA] mb-1.5

visual_effects.noise: Add a subtle CSS radial gradient or SVG noise to the background #0A0A0A to prevent completely flat darkness.

images.description: Vivid dark blue/purple gradient abstract. Use as a heavily blurred, low-opacity (10-20%) background behind the landing page hero section to create an ambient glow.
Glowing tech face avatar for the AI Interviewer in the interview room. Put in a circular or rounded-xl container with a subtle glowing #7C3AED border.
Professional Indian student portrait for user profile in the dashboard header and settings.

animations.reveal: framer-motion fade-in and slide-up for staggered lists
animations.active_mic: Pulse animation (animate-pulse) on the microphone button when recording, glowing with #2563EB or #7C3AED.

instructions_to_main_agent: Import fonts via Google Fonts: Outfit (Headings), Manrope (Body), and JetBrains Mono (Code/Mono).
Use lucide-react for iconography. Keep icons consistent in size (w-5 h-5 mostly) and color (text-[#A1A1AA]).
Implement Monaco Editor (@monaco-editor/react) for the code editing component in the interview room. Use the 'vs-dark' theme, overriding it to match #111111 background if possible.
The UI must be exclusively in Dark Mode (#0A0A0A background). Do not implement a light theme.
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for the Landing page (Linear vibe: big typography, high contrast, top-to-bottom scroll).
Use Shadcn UI for the Dashboard, Settings, and Feedback views. Customize Shadcn borders to #222222 and backgrounds to #111111.
Interview Room: Implement a split-screen design. Left Panel: AI Avatar (centered), active conversation captions, and mic controls. Right Panel: Code Editor with a language selector at the top.
Feedback Report: Use Recharts to show progress over time, or a spider chart (radar) for skill breakdown (e.g., Communication, Technical, Problem Solving).
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for testing (e.g., data-testid='start-interview-btn').
Ensure hover states explicitly set the text color (e.g., hover:text-white) over #A1A1AA elements.
No generic full-screen gradients. Use subtle lighting (drop-shadows, blurred absolute divs) behind elements to simulate the Linear/Vercel neon glow effect.
